digest.greeting: Jean, today did not have any dashboard items marked complete yet, so this EOD keeps the closeout grounded and conservative. The main open lanes are KPI approval, CoE/TL follow-up, Incident Response priority clarity, portfolio alignment, and recruiting feedback. Manana is meeting-heavy again, with the EPMO check-in, overlapping 3:00 PM project blocks, and the Javier Hurtado interview now visible on Outlook for Friday afternoon.

items.label: KPIs - confirm final approval
items.detail: Carried over from today's dashboard. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this out.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: Today's dashboard flags that Teams search found Jean noting no response yet from Cristian Garcia or Chelsea related to Jill's response on prioritizing the project. Use the BCP/Incident Response path to confirm leadership clarity and the next alignment call.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Today's dashboard lists an unread Supabase email reporting a critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled issue on Jean's project. Review whether the project is still active and whether the advisory needs remediation.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE guide
items.detail: Carry-over from today's dashboard. Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revision del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the remaining Team Leads.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Carry-over from today's dashboard. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected project areas for the EPMO; the Salesforce Program Overview remains the supporting context.

items.label: Align CoE priorities with Jorge
items.detail: Today's dashboard points to Jorge Grijalva's Portfolio Review Summary and the Portfolio alignment meeting as the evidence base. Follow up or decide the CoE priorities and upcoming work alignment.

items.label: Submit Isaac Gomez Ventura interview feedback
items.detail: A same-day Rippling email requested Jean's feedback on Isaac Gomez Ventura for Project Coordinator and asked that it be submitted promptly to keep the recruiting process on track.

items.label: Review Staff Aug - New PRD reply from Andrea
items.detail: Andrea Rodriguez sent a same-day reply on the Staff Aug PRD thread, copied to Jean and Nadia, with detailed input on rider matching, autopopulation, state/location handling, Ops status, address prediction, and court-information lookup items. Review whether EPMO needs to respond or fold the input into the PRD path.

items.label: Monitor request #0027951
items.detail: Today's dashboard says Mar Garcia followed up with Dana on request #0027951 and copied Jean and Anu Puri. Monitor or follow up if EPMO needs to help escalate after Dana responds.

items.label: Decide whether to restore expired recording
items.detail: Today's dashboard notes that SharePoint says the Weekly Touchpoint Staff Augmentation Project meeting recording expired and was deleted. Restore from the recycle bin only if that recording is still needed for Staff Augmentation context.

items.label: Interview - Javier Hurtado - Project Coordinator
items.detail: Outlook Calendar shows a same-day event titled Canceled: Interview - Javier Hurtado - Project Coordinator for the 11:30 AM slot. A separate Outlook event now shows the Javier Hurtado interview on Friday, June 5 at 4:00 PM.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Morning digest lists a 15-minute recurring touchpoint with Yuri Almeida.

items.label: Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: Morning digest lists the weekly sync with Yuri, Jhara, Andrea, Vidhi, Camilo, Mar, David, Santiago, and Anu.

items.detail: Morning digest lists Mar Garcia's CoE sync with Jean and David.

items.detail: Outlook confirms Sara moved this one hour earlier and added Nadia so programmatic updates can be included.

items.detail: Morning digest and Outlook show two 3:00 PM calendar blocks overlapping: Sprint #12 stakeholder planning and the Executive Project Status Slide Update. Confirm which one Jean should prioritize.

items.detail: Outlook Calendar now shows the Javier Hurtado Project Coordinator interview on Friday, June 5 at 4:00 PM with Eugenia Barragan and Jean.
